settings.title: Settings
settings.smsPermissionGrantedMessage: SMS permission granted. The app can now automatically detect bank transactions from your SMS.
settings.smsPermissionDeniedMessage:
SMS permission is required for automatic transaction detection.

To grant permission:
1. Tap 'Open Settings' below
2. Tap 'Permissions' or 'App permissions'
3. Find and enable 'SMS' or 'Messages'
4. Return to this app
settings.smsPermissionNotAvailable: SMS permission is only available on Android devices.
settings.smsPermissionError: Failed to request SMS permission. Please try again or grant permission manually from device settings.
settings.smsReadCountDescription: Number of SMS messages to read (1-1000)
settings.smsReadCountInvalid: Read count must be between 1 and 1000
settings.smsReadCountSaveError: Failed to save SMS read count
settings.smsDateGapDescription: Number of days to look back (1-365)
settings.smsDateGapModalDescription: Number of days to look back for SMS (1-365)
settings.smsDateGapInvalid: Date gap must be between 1 and 365 days
settings.smsDateGapSaveError: Failed to save SMS date gap
settings.signOutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
settings.signOutError: Failed to sign out. Please try again.
settings.deleteAccountConfirm:
This action cannot be undone. All your accounts, transactions, and data will be permanently deleted.

Are you sure you want to delete your account?

addAccount.assetSubtitle: Where is your money kept or any other assets?(Bank, Cash, Stocks, Mutual Funds, etc.)
addAccount.liabilitySubtitle: Do you have any loans/credits?(Home Loan, Car Loan, Personal Loan, Education Loan, Credit Card, etc.)
addAccount.expenseSubtitle: What are your daily or any other expenses?(Food, Rent, Utilities, Transportation, Entertainment, Shopping, etc.)
addAccount.incomeSubtitle: Where does your income come from or any other income?(Salary, Freelance, Business, Rental Income, Dividends, Interest, etc.)

error.enterValidBalance: Please enter a valid opening balance

info.assetDescription: Money you have, like bank balance, cash, gold, or investments. These accounts track what you own and can have opening balances. Examples include savings accounts, checking accounts, fixed deposits, stocks, mutual funds, gold, property, and cash in hand.
info.liabilityDescription: Loans, credit card dues, or any money you need to pay. These accounts track what you owe to others and can have opening balances. Examples include home loans, car loans, personal loans, credit card balances, education loans, and any other debts you need to repay.
info.incomeDescription: Salary, business income, rent, or any money coming in. These accounts track sources of money you receive. Examples include salary, freelance income, business profits, rental income, dividends, interest earned, gifts received, and any other money coming into your accounts.
info.expenseDescription: Daily costs like food, bills, travel, shopping, etc. These accounts track where your money goes. Examples include groceries, utilities, rent, transportation, entertainment, medical expenses, education fees, shopping, dining out, and any other money you spend.

dashboard.emptyLiabilitiesSubtext: Add your credit cards and loans

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.body: DailyMunim ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our mobile application.

informationCollected.title: 2. Information We Collect
informationCollected.personalInformationBody: We may collect personal information that you voluntarily provide, such as:
informationCollected.deviceInformationBody: We may collect information about your mobile device, including device model, operating system version, and unique device identifiers.

bullets.transactionData: Financial transaction data you enter manually
bullets.smsData: SMS data (only with your explicit permission for the SMS import feature)

usage.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
usage.body: We use the information we collect to:

bullets.processTransactions: Process your financial transactions and generate reports
bullets.improveExperience: Improve user experience and app functionality
bullets.authenticateIdentity: Authenticate your identity and secure your account

storageSecurity.title: 4. Data Storage and Security
storageSecurity.body: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data. Your financial data is stored securely. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

smsDataUsage.title: 5. SMS Data Usage
smsDataUsage.body: If you enable the SMS Import feature, the app accesses your SMS messages solely to extract transaction details (amount, date, merchant). This processing happens locally on your device. We do not upload your raw SMS messages to our servers.

yourRights.title: 6. Your Rights
yourRights.body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You can delete your account and all associated data directly within the app settings.

policyChanges.title: 7. Changes to This Policy
policyChanges.body: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page.

contact.title: 8. Contact Us
contact.body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at dailymunimorhome@gmail.com.

overview.title: Overview
overview.content: DailyMunim (Ghar Ka Daily Hisab Kitab) is a comprehensive personal finance and expense tracking application designed for Indian users. Track your daily expenses, manage multiple accounts, set up recurring transactions, and generate detailed financial reports.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.content: First time setup involves creating an account, setting up a secure PIN, and adding your first bank or cash account to start tracking.

installation.title: Installation
installation.content:
1. Download the app
2. Install and open
3. Sign up with email
4. Set up PIN for security

firstTimeSetup.title: First Time Setup
firstTimeSetup.content:
1. Authentication: Create account
2. PIN Setup: 4-6 digit PIN
3. Add Account: Create your first account
4. Start Tracking: Add transactions

accountManagement.title: Account Management
accountManagement.content: Manage your bank accounts, cash wallets, and credit cards in one place.

addingAccounts.title: Adding Accounts
addingAccounts.content: Go to Accounts tab -> Tap + Add Account -> Choose account type -> Enter details.

accountTypes.title: Account Types
accountTypes.content:
• Bank Account: Savings, Current
• Cash Account: Wallet, Petty Cash
• Credit Card: Monitor spending

transactionManagement.title: Transaction Management
transactionManagement.content: Record income and expenses manually or import from SMS.

addingTransactions.title: Adding Transactions
addingTransactions.content: Go to Transactions tab -> Tap + Add Transaction -> Select Income/Expense -> Enter details -> Save.

smsImport.title: SMS Import
smsImport.content: Go to More -> SMS Import -> Grant permissions -> Select bank SMS -> App automatically extracts details.

recurringTransactions.title: Recurring Transactions
recurringTransactions.content: Set up automatic transactions for regular bills, salaries, or subscriptions.

settingUp.title: Setting Up
settingUp.content: Go to More -> Repeat Transactions -> Tap + Add Recurring -> Set amount, frequency, and dates.

types.title: Types
types.content: Fixed/Variable amounts for Income (Salary) or Expense (Bills).

reportsAnalytics.title: Reports & Analytics
reportsAnalytics.content: Gain insights into your spending habits with detailed reports.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.content: Overview of total balance, monthly income/expense, and recent transactions.

detailedReports.title: Detailed Reports
detailedReports.content: Day-to-Day summaries, Month-to-Month comparisons, and Category-wise breakdowns.

settingsSecurity.title: Settings & Security
settingsSecurity.content: Customize your app experience and keep your data safe.

security.title: Security
security.content: Change PIN, Enable Biometric (Fingerprint/Face ID), Auto-lock settings.

appNotSyncing.title: App Not Syncing
appNotSyncing.content: Check internet connection, force refresh, or restart app.

pinIssues.title: PIN Issues
pinIssues.content: Use account recovery if forgotten, or reset through email.
